match.userMessage:
Cinematic still on 35mm film stock with natural grain, Scarlett in a loose linen shirt sits on a weathered wooden bench with knees drawn up, body angled toward the ocean as she twists open the lipstick and brings it to her lips in mid-application while gazing out at the horizon, wind catching her hair across her face, the Bondi Beach promenade stretches into soft focus with pale sand and gentle waves under a warm golden hour sky, distant surfers visible on the horizon line, shallow depth of field emphasizing the moment of pause with rich textures in the aged bench wood and linen fabric, natural directional side light from the setting sun casting long warm highlights and soft coral-tinted shadows across the scene, captured with a 50mm lens at eye level in a slightly low handheld composition that feels intimate and effortless.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - Wide ocean-side promenade
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
